checks.name: migration_readiness_is_executable_and_hash_bound
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
import builtins, json, typing
builtins.Path=Path; builtins.Any=typing.Any
package=Path('factoryline/__init__.py'); created=not package.exists(); package.parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True); package.touch(exist_ok=True)
try:
 from factoryline.migration import assess_migration_readiness, verify_migration_readiness
 categories=('unit','integration','e2e','lint_type','architecture','coverage_fuzz','environment','telemetry_security')
 with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
  root=Path(d); proof=root/'proof.json'; proof.write_text('{\"passed\":true}', encoding='utf-8')
  manifest=root/'readiness.json'; manifest.write_text(json.dumps({'schema':'factory.migration.readiness-input.v1','project':'smoke','checks':[{'id':f'check-{category}','category':category,'command':['tool','verify',category],'passed':True,'evidence':[str(proof)],**({'reproducibility_runs':{'passed':2,'total':2}} if category=='environment' else {})} for category in categories]}), encoding='utf-8')
  receipt=assess_migration_readiness(manifest, root); assert receipt['ready'] and receipt['lane_registration_pct']==100 and receipt['executable_proof_pct']==100
  assert verify_migration_readiness(Path(receipt['path']))['ready']
  proof.write_text('{\"passed\":false}', encoding='utf-8'); assert not verify_migration_readiness(Path(receipt['path']))['valid']
finally:
 package.unlink(missing_ok=True) if created else None

checks.name: repository_context_is_git_fact_bound
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
import builtins, subprocess, typing
builtins.Path=Path; builtins.Any=typing.Any
package=Path('factoryline/__init__.py'); created=not package.exists(); package.parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True); package.touch(exist_ok=True)
try:
 from factoryline.migration import build_repository_context, verify_repository_context
 with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
  root=Path(d); subprocess.run(['git','init',str(root)],check=True,capture_output=True); subprocess.run(['git','-C',str(root),'config','user.email','smoke@example.com'],check=True); subprocess.run(['git','-C',str(root),'config','user.name','Smoke'],check=True)
  (root/'app.py').write_text('print(\"ok\")\n',encoding='utf-8'); subprocess.run(['git','-C',str(root),'add','.'],check=True); subprocess.run(['git','-C',str(root),'commit','-m','record context'],check=True,capture_output=True)
  receipt=build_repository_context(root); assert receipt['tracked_files']==1 and receipt['video_overview']['status']=='planned'; assert verify_repository_context(Path(receipt['path']))['valid']
  lore=root/'.factory/context/LORE.md'; lore.write_text('tampered\n',encoding='utf-8'); assert not verify_repository_context(Path(receipt['path']))['valid']
finally:
 package.unlink(missing_ok=True) if created else None

checks.name: browser_control_no_finish_is_enforced
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
import builtins, typing
builtins.Path=Path; builtins.Any=typing.Any
package=Path('factoryline/__init__.py'); created=not package.exists(); package.parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True); package.touch(exist_ok=True)
try:
 from factoryline.product_missions import compile_product_prd, plan_value_slices, create_mission
 prd_text='# Browser proof\n\n## Requirements\n- REQ-DASH: The operator must view the dashboard.\n\n## Acceptance\nScenario: View dashboard\n  Given an operator\n  When the page opens\n  Then the dashboard is visible\n'
 with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
  root=Path(d); prd=root/'PRD.md'; prd.write_text(prd_text,encoding='utf-8'); graph=compile_product_prd(prd,root); slices=plan_value_slices(Path(graph['path']),root); mission=create_mission(Path(slices['path']),slices['slices'][0]['id'],root,'owner')
  browser=next(item for item in mission['completion_contract']['criteria'] if item['verification_kind']=='browser_control'); assert browser['evidence_contract']['max_clicks']==3; assert 'BROWSER_CONTROL_CRITERION_BOUND' in mission['markers']
finally:
 package.unlink(missing_ok=True) if created else None
